sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_applylabel_t (personnelid,applytype,applylabel1,applylabel2,applylabel1name,applylabel2name,validflag,adddepartmentid, addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo,applyreason) VALUES ($personnelid$,$applytype$,'$applylabel1$','$applylabel2$','$applylabel1name$','$applylabel2name$',$validflag$,$adddepartmentid$, $addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$applyreason$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from p_personnel_applylabel_t ap left join p_attributelabel_t at on ap.applylabel1=at.id left join p_personnel_t p on p.id = ap.personnelid where ap.validflag>0 and at.validflag>0 and p.validflag>0 and ap.examineflag = #examineflag#
ap.personnelid = #personnelid#
ap.addoperatorid = #addoperatorid#
FIND_IN_SET('$departmentid$',at.departmentid)
ap.addoperator like '%$addoperator$%'

select ap.*,p.cardnumber,p.personname from p_personnel_applylabel_t ap left join p_attributelabel_t at on ap.applylabel1=at.id left join p_personnel_t p on p.id = ap.personnelid where ap.validflag>0 and at.validflag>0 and p.validflag>0
ap.personnelid = $personnelid$
ap.addoperatorid = #addoperatorid#
FIND_IN_SET('$departmentid$',at.departmentid)
ap.examineflag = $examineflag$
ap.addoperator like '%$addoperator$%'
order by ap.examineflag,ap.addtime desc
select * from p_personnel_applylabel_t where personnelid=#personnelid# and applylabel1=#applylabel1# and examineflag=0
